scripts.pack:web: npm run build && powershell -NoProfile -Command "Compress-Archive -Path dist\\* -DestinationPath xiaocampus-web.zip -Force"
scripts.pack:netlify: npm run build && powershell -NoProfile -Command "Compress-Archive -Path dist\\* -DestinationPath xiaocampus-netlify.zip -Force"
scripts.deploy:cloudflare: npm run build && npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name xiaoxingxuezhang
